programme.title: The Fugitive

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: A special agent forms a team of geniuses to combat hi-tech threats of the modern age, and hires former child prodigy Walter O'Brien to lead the gang. Their first mission sees them assigned by the government to help land planes at Los Angeles airport after the communications system shuts down due to a bug. Drama, inspired by a true story, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Jadyn Wong

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The governor's daughter is 'bio-hacked' and given a deadly virus. She only has 24 hours to live, so Scorpion is called in to save her. However, the mission causes tension with Walter after he receives a letter detailing his sister Megan's worsening multiple sclerosis. Drama, inspired by a true story, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Jadyn Wong

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A nuclear power plant inspector suffers radiation poisoning, forcing the team to consider the possibility that a foreign power deliberately targeted him. As the others investigate, Ziva spends time with the ailing victim - and begins to realise she is developing feelings for him. Drama, guest starring Matthew Marsden, with Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at a mausoleum exposes a number of freshly dismembered bodies, prompting the team to launch a multiple murder investigation to identify the victims. Meanwhile, Abby has a personal problem to deal with - and it seems Gibbs is the only person she will confide in. Drama, starring Pauley Perrette and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A supposedly dead marine suddenly regains consciousness on the autopsy table, leaving the team struggling to solve the mystery of how he came to be in such a strange predicament. Investigations reveal he had recently been on a trip to Baghdad - and uncover an unexpected link to Gibbs' past. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The unit is tipped off about terrorist activity, and two agents are murdered during the ensuing investigation. Believing the information to be a set-up, the team tries to solve the case with assistance from a guilt-stricken Paula Cassidy, who holds herself responsible for the tragedy. Drama, starring Jessica Steen

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee feels the pressure as the team investigates a double murder that appears to be inspired by his still unpublished new novel. His sense of guilt is compounded by the realisation that one of his colleagues could become the killer's third target. American drama following the work of the Naval Criminal Investigative Service, starring Sean Murray and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: In an effort to find the terrorist Parsa, Gibbs and the NCIS team track down one of his cohorts using evidence gleaned from the drone attack which has killed six people and wounded a further 22. Meanwhile, an emotionally shaken McGee struggles with the ramifications of the incident. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, Sean Murray, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a port authority officer reveals Parsa's possible whereabouts as the team continues the hunt for the terrorist intent on wiping out NCIS. Bishop reveals her past association with the quarry and suggests where she thinks he may be found, but the CIA has intercepted a call that places Parsa in a different location to Ellie's hunch. Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team uncovers faulty bulletproof vests in an abandoned truck filled with stolen USMC merchandise, and attempts to locate the source of the cargo and any vests that could have been sent to military personnel overseas. Crime drama, guest starring Challen Cates, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy reservist is found dead in his home with marks around his neck, and Gibbs and the team discover he was working on a highly classified case for the department of defence. The circumstances surrounding the man's demise lead the investigators to suspect someone was secretly trying to drive him insane, bringing them into contact with Samantha Ryan, the director of a division specialising in psychological warfare. Guest starring Jamie Lee Curtis

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Chief petty officer Leland Wiley dies of a heart attack just as he is about to reveal information on elusive arms dealer Agah Bayar. The team discovers the cardiac arrest was caused by someone hacking into a computer monitoring Wiley's pacemaker and increasing his heart rate to 400bpm. Meanwhile, a probationary agent tries to impress Gibbs and win a place on his team. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, with Tamer Hassan and Matt L Jones

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Confidential files are leaked by an anonymous hacker, who threatens to release more unless the Navy agrees to renew a contract with a struggling shipbuilding firm. The Navy Secretary suspects the company's owner Philip Wickes is to blame, and asks NCIS to join forces with the PsyOps unit in an elaborate ruse to bring the culprit out of hiding. Meanwhile, Gibbs' colleagues begin to notice his attraction to his opposite number Samantha Ryan. Guest starring Jamie Lee Curtis

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Vance's brother-in-law Michael Thomas is linked to the murder of a petty officer, and Gibbs is placed under pressure to clear the man's name. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Rocky Carroll

programme.desc: Sharon worries her biological clock is ticking away and decides the time has come to have a baby - much to the alarm of Tracey. Meanwhile, Dorien tries to hit the headlines with tales of her amazing conquests. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: The Bill

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: The decision over whether Connie or Michael gets the director of surgery job falls to Jayne, and Joseph's suspicions about Faye's fidelity mount when he discovers she phoned Linden on their wedding day. programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: The Holby staff bid an emotional farewell to Roxy who decides she's had enough. Fin puts his life in danger to save his daughter from a burning building. Praised for his heroic rescue bid, Fin is soon brought down to earth when a woman he refused to treat at the scene later dies. Away from the hospital, a traumatised Nina appears to be falling for Abs. Prunella Scales and Christopher Timothy guest star

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Phil's spell in uniform comes to a triumphant end when he borrows a bike to chase a mugger and recovers £15,000 in cash. The case gets more interesting when the victim admits he's being blackmailed. Heaton reassures terrified prosecution witness Martin Turnbull he will be given protection following threats from Ray Moore, only to discover the villainous ex-cop has subtler ways of intimidating people

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Ricky is upset when he receives divorce papers. Robbie starts washing windscreens to help Carol pay for her TV licence. Pat and Roy go to the Vic for a drink but Frank appears

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Pauline takes on the council, as Roy takes up a fight of his own. Robbie and Tony get inspiration, Sam gives Ricky an ultimatum and Phil attends an antenatal class

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracy and Sharon discover they have been mentioned in an Irish relative's will, but when they arrive on the Emerald Isle they are disappointed to find they have inherited a field. Final episode of the comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Julienne oversees the opening of a family planning clinic at the local community centre, leading mother-of-three Wilma Goddens to start taking the contraceptive pill behind her husband's back. Barbara is distraught when she discovers that her father has accepted a missionary posting in New Guinea for the next three years so will not be able to officiate at her wedding, while Violet suffers terribly with hot flushes, Christopher asks Trixie to meet his daughter, and Delia's heartache may finally be over

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Boxing Day sees heavy snowfall covering the country and the adverse weather causes major disruption across Poplar as roads become blocked and pipes freeze meaning families have to queue outside for water from standpipes. Sister Julienne must inform a family about the death of their loved one and uncovers an uncomfortable truth, while Valerie helps an unmarried couple living in a caravan prepare for their baby, but unforeseen complications knock her confidence in her ability as a midwife. Guest starring Anita Dobson

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A new midwife joins the team as the area is rocked by power cuts and blizzards. The new arrival is delayed by the weather and falls ill as soon as she arrives. However, she is quickly dragged from her sick bed to assist with a difficult birth. Nurse Crane and Dr Turner treat an elderly cancer patient who faces losing her house due to slum clearances, and try to convince Sergeant Woolf to allow her to die at home

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: An innocuous section of woodland soon becomes a legendary site renowned for its ghostly activity, due to the inventive rumours put about by Alvin, Truly and Clegg. Long-running comedy, starring Peter Sallis, Frank Thornton and Brian Murphy

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A local writer is murdered, leaving Father Brown delving into her novel Lulu and Lucia for clues as to who might have committed such a crime

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part one of two. A man is found murdered on his boat five miles out at sea, with no possible way a killer could have escaped. At first Humphrey turns his attention to the small group he was with the night before he died - but as the investigation deepens, the investigation takes an unexpected turn that requires the team to leave the comfort of their Caribbean island - and go searching for their suspects in London. Kris Marshall stars

programme.title: Frankie Drake Mysteries
programme.desc: Frankie and the team set out to outcon a conman dealing in mythical prime real estate, who has already duped Nora and Mildred. Period crime drama, starring Lauren Lee Smith as the first female private detective in 1920s Toronto

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Sandra's private and professional worlds become intertwined when her mother has a fall that means she needs to go into a care home. Her first choice is revealed to be the scene of a suspicious death a year earlier, leading Jack, Gerry and Brian to go undercover at the home. Drama, guest starring June Whitfield, Sheila Hancock and Gwyneth Strong

programme.title: Spooks
programme.desc: Following Lucas's shocking revelations about his former life and double identity, Harry instructs the team to find him - at any cost. He enlists the help of a former internal affairs specialist to track down the fugitive, who is becoming increasingly desperate to locate the Albany file and flee the country with Maya. When Harry discovers Ruth has been placed in grave danger, he faces a tough decision that culminates in a showdown with Lucas

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The Lynleys are looking forward to becoming parents, but Helen succumbs to temptation and dabbles in her husband's latest case. However, her past involvement with the victim unwittingly puts her in the firing line, with devastating consequences for everyone. Jemma Redgrave and Barbara Flynn guest star, with Nathaniel Parker, Sharon Small and Lesley Vickerage

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: Feature-length drama in which the Middle Ages' answer to Sherlock Holmes sets out to investigate a slave girl's disappearance and locate a treasured relic missing from his abbey. Unfortunately, no sooner has he begun searching for a connection than a dead body turns up on his doorstep, plunging him into a mire of murder and subterfuge. Starring Derek Jacobi, Terrence Hardiman, Anthony Green, George Irving and Louise Delamere

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: A woman's corpse is discovered in a ploughed field, and the only lead is her husband, a potter. A year earlier, he suddenly decided to start a new life as a monk, suggesting that his wife may have committed suicide because she could not bear to lose him to the brethren - or that her spouse may have had a hand in her death. Medieval mystery, starring Derek Jacobi

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: The treacherous Major Brand attempts to dupe Sharpe into helping him betray Ross to the French, while back behind British lines Jane has to deal with the amorous advances of a poet. Sean Bean stars, with Daragh O'Malley, Mark Strong and Abigail Cruttenden

programme.title: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: The arrival of two former colleagues from Manchester antagonises Gene, who refuses to believe their claim they have pursued a retired stand-up comedian to London because he stole from the Police Widows' Fund. As the hunt turns competitive, it becomes clear the suspect is terrified - and when gunshots ring out, the team realises why. However, further complications arise after the visitors make it clear to Alex they have information about Sam Tyler's death

programme.title: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: Viv is taken hostage during a prison riot, prompting Ray and Chris to go undercover to free him - but the violent criminal leading the revolt soon recognises them as police, leaving three officers in danger. Alex hopes catching a convict who escaped during the crisis will help, but he leaves her more unsettled than ever by insisting they have met before. Stanley Townsend (Rough Diamond) guest stars

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Valerie's friend Marjory goes into labour while Lucille is on duty, and the new recruit successfully delivers the baby. However, when Marjory's health takes a turn for the worst, her racist mother Mae accuses Lucille of incompetence. The nurses rally round to protect their new colleague, and convince her that she is welcome in the community. Sister Winifred comes up with a plan to get fathers more actively involved in their wives' pregnancies - but finds that very few of the local men are keen on the idea

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Nurse Crane and Trixie investigate when a mother abandons her children at the clinic, fearing they were being abused or neglected. Her husband admits that she has been behaving strangely lately, and when she is referred to a neurologist by Dr Turner, the truth proves devastating for the whole family. Christopher admits that Alexandra has been unhappy since his divorce, and Violet and Fred organise a beauty contest to raise money for charity. Valerie and Magda both sign up and quickly become close friends - leading to the sharing of a terrible secret

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Julienne helps a woman from Pakistan who is unable to have children, but who has found to her shock that her husband is bringing a second wife into their home, who is already eight months pregnant. Trixie hits the bottle following her break-up with Christopher, Dr Turner tries to persuade Sister Monica Joan to admit that her eyesight is failing, and Lucille helps a woman with a compulsion to eat coal

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Rumours spread around Poplar that a sailor with smallpox is hiding somewhere in town. Nurse Crane and Dr Turner try to track him down before he causes an outbreak. Lucille treats an expectant mother on her own, but soon feels out of her depth when she displays signs of a serious medical condition. Trixie goes to stay with her godmother, Violet and Fred organise a picnic for the parish, and Tom and Barbara return home

programme.title: Miss Fisher's Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: The murder of an Italian grandmother in her restaurant kitchen leads to the investigation of an Italian crime syndicate

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective teams up with an officer from the North West Mounted Police to investigate the suspicious death of a man who fell from a third-floor window, and is surprised by how similar the lawman's methods are to his own. Yannick Bisson stars

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: The body of a woman is discovered in woodland and all evidence points to suicide, but Taggart's suspicions are shared by the victim's sister who thinks her brother-in-law is responsible. Detective drama, starring Mark McManus

programme.title: Gregory's Girl (1981)
programme.desc: A gawky teenager is dismayed to be relegated to goalkeeper in the school football team - but his thoughts turn to romance once he meets the female striker who takes his place. However, his awkward nature proves an obstacle to winning her over, despite the sage advice of his worldly-wise little sister. Comedy, starring John Gordon Sinclair, Dee Hepburn, Jake D'Arcy, Clare Grogan and Robert Buchanan

programme.title: Judge John Deed
programme.desc: The maverick High Court Judge's daughter is arrested during a demonstration, presenting him with the challenge of getting her off the hook without falling foul of powerful enemies he has made in his single-minded push to the top of the legal profession. Martin Shaw, Donald Sinden and Caroline Langrishe star

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Emma is feeling raw after her marital difficulties boiled over into violence and shows her tough side to new recruit Beth Green (former EastEnder Louisa Lytton) as they investigate a woman's claim her baby has been stolen. Jack is anxious to prove he's a worthy DCI and agrees to go undercover with Sam to get a lead on the illegal baby-selling business, but his mistake puts the DI in danger

programme.desc: Will and Nikki investigate the suspicious death of a child protection officer on the Cheetham estate. Boothby Graffoe guest stars

programme.title: The Bill

programme.title: Catherine Cookson's The Round Tower
programme.desc: Feature-length drama set in the 1950s, starring Emilia Fox as the rebellious teenage daughter of a successful businessman and his devoted wife, whose disenchantment with her privileged upbringing ultimately provokes a scandal in their small town. Keith Barron and Jan Harvey also star

programme.title: Victoria Wood's Midlife Christmas
programme.desc: A festive special from 2009 that attempts to cram an entire night's Christmas viewing into 60 minutes. Highlights include the Midlife Olympics 2009, popular costume drama Lark Pies to Cranchesterford and the adventures of soap star Bo Beaumont, played by Victoria's long-time collaborator Julie Walters. Others joining in the fun are Delia Smith, Jayne Torvill, Christopher Dean, Reece Shearsmith and Anton Du Beke

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Barbara helps a pregnant mother-of-two whose husband has recently died, and is on hand to give her support when a further tragedy drives her and her children from their home. Lucille teaches a health and relationships class at the youth club, only to encounter a furious mother who objects to her daughter attending. Sister Monica Joan goes into hospital for cataract surgery

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Barbara's condition is not improving and she is kept in isolation at the hospital, leaving her friends able to do nothing but wait for more news. Dr Turner and Shelagh assist a man being held in a remand home whose wife is pregnant, while Lucille makes some new friends

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nurses and midwives of Nonnatus House prepare to celebrate Sister Monica Joan's birthday, but plans are put on hold when the closure of a nearby maternity home leaves them inundated with new patients, many of whom are in urgent need of support. Lucille treats a woman whose father is offering shelter to an old friend suffering with memory loss, and as November 22, 1963 arrives, the residents of Poplar are rocked by shocking news from America

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: As Poplar prepares for Christmas, the nuns travel to the Mother House to elect a new mother superior. Sister Julienne is the obvious replacement and must face this possibility as her future at Nonnatus House hangs in the balance. As they ready to leave, Sister Mildred, an indefatigable member of their order, arrives unexpectedly with four Chinese orphans en route to the Children's Home at the Mother House while, back in Poplar, Trixie returns from Portofino with her troubles behind her and Valerie leads the baby ballet Christmas performance

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The second of a two-part story picks up where things left off last week, with Humphrey, Florence and Dwayne having swapped the sun and sand of the Caribbean for the cold and noise of London. Their latest investigation has taken them back to the detective inspector's home town - but they've hit a brick wall with the discovery of another dead body. And now they have two murders to solve. Meanwhile, Dwayne has an emotional encounter and Humphrey receives advice from an unexpected source that helps him reach a big decision. Crime drama, starring Kris Marshall, Danny John-Jules and Josephine Jobert, with guest appearances from Ardal O'Hanlon and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch visits his brother Jasper in Victoria, British Columbia, for the Christmas holidays, but they end up investigating a murder connected to an archaeologist working on the site of an ancient settlement. Festive edition of the crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: A young boy falls into a creek and drowns, while his mother is found slumped in the hallway. Dr Stephen Andrews discovers both ingested rat poison, and suspicion falls on the grieving husband and father. The detective soon uncovers a sordid case of extortion and forgery as part of his investigation. Crime drama, starring Mark McManus
