programme.title: Mòd 2020
programme.desc: Highlights from previous Children's Mod, focusing on solo singing, traditional singing, folk groups, choral singing and winners of the An Comunn Gàidhealach Silver Medals

programme.title: Cearcaill Ceo
programme.desc: The Lewis car rally culture of the 70s and 80s, which saw a young generation with keen engineering instincts watching as TV brought rallying into their homes for the first time

programme.title: Tide Lines 2020
programme.desc: Music show featuring the band Tide Lines in a specially recorded performance in Glasgow’s SWG3. With the absence of any gigs in 2020, Tide Lines took the opportunity to showcase new performances of classic material and some brand new material in a specially recorded session. This programme features a selection from that performance originally aired in July 2020. Alongside fans' favourites, the band perform a new Gaelic song and also a beautiful collaboration with Tamzene

programme.title: Charley Pride
programme.desc: The improbable journey of the trailblazing country music superstar, from his humble beginnings as a sharecropper’s son on a cotton farm in segregated Sledge, Mississippi, to his career as a baseball player and his meteoric rise in music. This new documentary reveals how Pride’s love for music led him from the Delta to a larger, grander world. In the 1940s, radio transcended racial barriers, making it possible for Pride to grow up listening to and imitating Grand Ole Opry stars like Ernest Tubb and Roy Acuff. At a time when African-American singers were more notable for R&B hits, Charley Pride followed his passion for country music, overcoming obstacles through determination and raw talent to make a lasting impact on the genre and create a legacy that continues today

programme.title: Air Iomall-Music from the Edge
programme.desc: Two of Scotland's leading young traditional musicians, Charlie Grey and Joseph Peach, take a musical voyage on the Dutch vessel Wylde Swan to some of the most remote islands off Scotland's north-west coast

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: BBC Alba joins Radio nan Gàidheal, the BBC's Gaelic language radio service

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: BBC Alba joins Radio nan Gàidheal, the BBC's Gaelic language radio service

programme.title: Bioran (Stick Man)
programme.desc: The adventures of the father of a family of sticks, who crosses great distances to try to get home in time for Christmas. Stick Man lives in the family tree with his Stick Lady Love and their stick children three. However, it's dangerous being a Stick Man - a dog wants to play with him, a swan builds her nest with him and he even ends up on a fire

programme.title: Zog
programme.desc: Keen but accident-prone dragon Zog gets himself into mischief while learning how to fly, roar, breathe fire and fight knights in his first four years at Dragon School. Each year he meets a kindly young girl who patches up his bumps and bruises, but can she help him with his trickiest challenge yet? It's year five and he has to capture a princess. Animated adaptation of Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler's book, featuring the voices of Lenny Henry, Tracey Ullman, Hugh Skinner, Patsy Ferran and Kit Harington

programme.title: Sol ()
programme.desc: Sol, a 10-year old boy who is grieving after the loss of his grandmother Nonee, tries to figure out a way forward without her

programme.title: Suiteis as na Speuran!/The Great Northern Candy Drop
programme.desc: A Public Officer prohibits a pilot, who has been delivering Christmas gifts to remote areas of Canada for over 50 years by dropping them from his plane, from doing so

programme.desc: Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA

programme.title: Scottish Premiership Football
programme.desc: Kilmarnock v Livingston. Full coverage of the top-flight clash at Rugby Park. Match commentary from Hugh Dan MacLennan

programme.title: Spòrs na Bliadhna 2020/Sport Review 2020
programme.desc: Ruairidh Alastair MacLennan presents this year's sporting highlights, including the effect of Covid-19 on the International Island Games, and curlers Eve Muirhead and Bruce Mouat reveal how the pandemic affected their year

programme.title: Port
programme.desc: Bruce MacGregor, Liz Doherty, Mhairi Hall and Mike Vass gather in Inverness to lend musical weight to Falls of Lora

programme.title: Mach a Seo: Na Fir-chlis
programme.desc: Since reading about the aurora borealis in his childhood, Ramsay MacMahon has dreamt of seeing this natural phenomenon. But after years of watching and waiting for the elusive Northern Lights to appear, he can wait to longer. He’s set himself a challenge - to see the aurora before the winter is out. Harnessing the power of the technology available to him, he redoubles his efforts to be in the right place at the right time to witness the aurora. Will he succeed, or will these magical lights continue to elude him?

programme.title: An Taistealaiche/The Far Traveller
programme.desc: Some 500 years before Columbus, the granddaughter of a slave in Scotland crossed the Atlantic eight times. She gave birth to the first European child in North America, and even made a pilgrimage to the Vatican. This documentary retraces Gudrid Thorbjarnardottir's brave steps from Greenland to Newfoundland and beyond

programme.desc: For the first time ever, Phillip Schofield and Holly Willoughby host a special episode of the programme for Christmas Day. They offer heart-warming surprises and are joined by special guests and some familiar faces as they celebrate the most iconic day of the year

programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: For the first time ever on Christmas Day, James invites viewers around to his house and kicks off the day's celebrations in style, serving up a feast of festive food and entertainment for guests Denise Van Outen and Chris Evans. He is joined in the kitchen by The Ritz's head chef John Williams, and Bake Off Creme De La Creme winner Mark Tilling treats viewers to some of his deliciously decadent chocolate creations

programme.title: Ainsley's Food We Love
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott is joined by Christopher Biggins, Martine McCutcheon and Brian Turner for this Christmas special. On the menu are festive bubble patties, Thai turkey and coconut broth with chilli, coconut and coriander scones, and chocolate bread and butter pudding with spiced cherries. Plus, drinks expert Olly Smith is on hand to knock up some festive tipples, including an alcoholic chocolate milkshake

programme.title: The Queen
programme.desc: Her Majesty's annual address to the nation and the people of the Commonwealth

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers in full HD, using the latest technology. A postman is attacked by a turkey, a toddler asks Santa for beer and a runaway car wrecks a grotto

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts with a special festive episode of the popular general knowledge quiz. A team of five panto performers takes on the Tenable Tower and answers a series of taxing top tens. Can its members bag themselves the ultimate Christmas present and walk away with a £125,000 jackpot?

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Colin Jackson, Anne Diamond, Josie Long and Nicky Campbell answer general knowledge questions and work as a team to take on all five of the ruthless Chasers and secure a charity prize. Anne Hegerty, Mark Labbett, Jenny Ryan, Paul Sinha and Shaun Wallace have donned their glam rags for the show, but will the celebs outshine the Chasers? Bradley Walsh presents

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Charity is full of resentment, Al's secret is revealed, and it remains to be seen whether the Dingle wedding will go ahead

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: After David and Shona admit that they still love each other and want to make a go of it, he forms a plan. Toyah and Imran adjust to becoming parents overnight, and Leanne hides away in her flat, consumed with grief

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: Ant and Dec welcome the most memorable and talented acts from the past 14 years, inviting them to collaborate and perform together for the ultimate Christmas extravaganza. Joining the hosts are judges Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon, David Walliams and Ashley Banjo, who will be ready to be impressed by a whole host of talent. All four will also be stepping out from their seats and into the limelight for the very first time in what promises to be a festive-filled show

programme.title: It's Clarkson on TV
programme.desc: The acerbic host passes judgement on what the great British public watched in 2020 - and didn't - and highlights some fascinating foreign TV shows that managed to make it to air. Shows under his gaze include gripping dramas White House Farm, Quiz and Des, as well as the latest offerings from the streaming services including dating shows such as Love Is Blind and property shows like Selling Sunset

programme.title: It'll Be Alright on the Night
programme.desc: David Walliams unwraps a batch of brand-new slip-ups for Christmas and reviews the greatest TV blunders of 2020, featuring some of the UK's most-famous faces. David reveals which world leaders and members of the royal family have all been caught out on camera

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Alan Carr's Epic Gameshow
programme.desc: The comedian revives another classic game show with a special festive edition of The Price Is Right. Eight members of the studio audience will be invited to 'Come on Down' and spin the famous wheel, guess the value of assorted items, and compete in the Epic Showcase for the chance to win a mountain of Christmas prizes

programme.title: The Big Quiz
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a special edition of the quiz show in which teams from ITV's biggest soaps battle it out. Jack P Shepherd captains the Coronation Street team and is joined by Simon Gregson and Sair Khan, while Mark Charnock takes the lead for Emmerdale, alongside Karen Blick and Jay Kontzle

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show
programme.desc: Jonathan presents an hour of festive fun and chat, joined by comedian and presenter Bradley Walsh and his son Barney, soon to be seen in another series of their thrill-seeking travelogue Breaking Dad, and Olympic star Mo Farah, most recently seen battling the bugs on I'm a Celebrity. His other guests are actress Michelle Keegan, popular stand-up Kevin Bridges, comic and Celebrity Juice star Emily Atack and chart-topping singer Jess Glynne, who also performs in the studio

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts with a special festive episode of the popular general knowledge quiz. A team of five panto performers takes on the Tenable Tower and answers a series of taxing top tens. Can its members bag themselves the ultimate Christmas present and walk away with a £125,000 jackpot?

programme.title: Nadia's Family Feasts
programme.desc: Nadia Sawalha is joined by chef Eran Tibi to dish up a family feast from the Middle East. The menu comprises an Israeli mezze of stuffed brick and sweet potato hummus for breakfast, mussakhan for lunch, Eran's aubergine, tomato and beef stew for dinner and Nadia's cigar baklava with cheat's pistachio ice cream for dessert

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo, a Christmas volunteer in a supermarket, thinks a burglar is entering overnight and decides to stop him.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo forgets to include Mr Cat in his letter to Santa! To make amends he follows Weasel, dressed as an elf, who leads him to the AeroFizz.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Animation following the kindly but accident-prone Mr Magoo. Magoo mistakes Weasel for a tuna being pursued by a fisherman.

programme.title: Thunderbirds Are Go
programme.desc: International Rescue responds when an atmospheric cleaning machine malfunctions, trapping its maintenance crew inside. As the Tracy brother and their allies rush to the rescue, Parker is forced to square off with a figure from his misspent youth. With the voice of guest star Alan Ford

programme.title: Dare Master at Home
programme.desc: Danny attempts a dizzy penalty shootout and competes to find out who will stack the highest number of dice in a minute

programme.title: Mighty Mike
programme.desc: Following a bump to the head, Mercury seems to be acting like a dog, much to Mike's surprise

programme.title: Mighty Mike
programme.desc: There's a new sheriff in town when Mike attempts to stop the raccoons from using Tom's train set to ship their loot back to their den.

programme.title: Mighty Mike
programme.desc: Mike hopes to win over Iris by showering her with roses, and decides the best way to do that is by borrowing Stephan's leaf blower

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean looks back over his life, recalling how he acquired his beloved teddy bear and learned to drive. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Chaotic cartoon capers following the further adventures of the popular halfwit immortalised in the live-action TV series and Hollywood film. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Mavis meets Krampus and begs him to fix a thousand-year-old mistake so Lydia will allow everyone else to enjoy a family Creepmas

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Animated series serving as a prequel to the popular film series. Mavis continues her mission to convince Krampus to fix a 1000-year-old mistake so that Aunt Lydia will allow everyone else to enjoy a family Creepmas.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum
programme.desc: Animated series based on the Marvel superhero team. The Environmental Clean-Up Conference is off to anything but a smooth start when Tony Stark realises that his fellow competitor is his rival Justin Hammer, but when a mysterious saboteur turns the inventions at the conference against the scientists there, it's up to Iron Man to save the day. At the same time, Captain America finally has a day off but cannot decide what to do with his free time - then the forces of AIM attack...

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum
programme.desc: Animated series based on the Marvel superhero team. A high-tech, high-speed chase through the streets of New York City breaks out when Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk try to recover Tony Stark's Weather Machine from AIM, but The Avengers soon find themselves fighting not only Detroit Steel and the forces of AIM, but also an old foe from Captain America's past - Red Skull!

programme.title: The Story of SM:TV Live
programme.desc: Ant and Dec reunite with Cat Deeley to look back on making the Saturday morning kids' show, revisiting the studio where the series was filmed and reminiscing about their favourite segments and running gags, including Wonky Donkey, Chums, and Dec's obsession with Sabrina the Teenage Witch. Featuring classic clips and contributions from guests and celebrity fans, including Kylie Minogue, Stephen Mulhern, Fleur East and Scarlett Moffatt

programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: For the first time ever on Christmas Day, James invites viewers around to his house and kicks off the day's celebrations in style, serving up a feast of festive food and entertainment for guests Denise Van Outen and Chris Evans. He is joined in the kitchen by The Ritz's head chef John Williams, and Bake Off Creme De La Creme winner Mark Tilling treats viewers to some of his deliciously decadent chocolate creations

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of the 3.00 Ladbrokes King George VI Steeple Chase from Kempton Park, which follows races at 1.15, 1.50 and 2.25. Plus, the 2.05 Rowland Meyrick Handicap Chase from Wetherby. With analysis from AP McCoy and Mick Fitzgerald, reports by Oli Bell, Luke Harvey and Matt Chapman, and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Shrek the Halls
programme.desc: Festive animated short featuring the full whimsical cast of the hit film series. Shrek settles down for a quiet Christmas with Fiona and the babies, but Donkey and the ogre's other friends have their own ideas - and the party soon descends into chaos. Featuring the voices of Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Back in 2011, McFly singer Tom Fletcher faced the Cube, while his bandmates watched on. Now it's Danny Jones and Dougie Poynter's turn. Can they beat Tom's impressive winnings of £100,000? They're not the only ones appearing tonight, however. Actress and comedian Emily Atack and her mum, the impressionist Kate Robbins, also tackle the various tasks of mental agility and physical ability in a bid to win a quarter of a million for their chosen charities. Presented by Phillip Schofield

programme.title: In for a Penny
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern is in Bath for this festive special, challenging Christmas shoppers with a series of challenges to win £1,000 and a holiday. The show features popular regular rounds including Mum's The Word, Pump It Up, Cross Dressing and Driving Me Round The Bend, alongside an ice-skating challenge and trying to guess the identity of a mysterious celebrity Santa

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Tim Lovejoy, Kay Burley, Eni Aluko and Richard Herring pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential charity prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: Joel Dommett hosts the return of the singing contest, in which a celebrity panel and a studio audience must guess the famous faces performing behind elaborate costumes. Rita Ora, Jonathan Ross, Davina McCall all return on the panel, joined by newcomer Mo Gilligan, and this opening episode sees the first six mystery celebrities battling it out - Robin v Alien, Swan v Dragon and Sausage v Badger

programme.title: Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing head judge Shirley Ballas introduces her family, who take on Irish model and TV presenter Vogue Williams, her husband Spencer Matthews and their clan, for a chance to win a £30,000 jackpot prize for charity. Presented by Gino D'Acampo

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Good Morning Britain anchor Piers Morgan and Diversity's Jordan Banjo take up the challenge, hoping to win as much as £1million for their chosen charities. As ever, lifelines including Phone a Friend, Ask the Host and 50-50 are available to them if they get stuck. Presented by Jeremy Clarkson

programme.title: The Holiday (2006)
programme.desc: Two single women living on opposite sides of the Atlantic agree to exchange houses over the Christmas holidays. In their new surroundings, both women unexpectedly encounter prospective partners, but as the house swap draws to a close, difficult decisions have to be made about their blossoming relationships. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Kate Winslet, Jack Black, Jude Law and Eli Wallach

programme.title: Britain's Brightest Family
programme.desc: Having made it through the semi-finals, two families go head to head in the final round of the tournament, hosted by Anne Hegerty, hoping to win the coveted title of Britain's Brightest Family and a holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz is recording chill music to de-stress the world, so he needs quiet. Unluckily, Magoo's come over to borrow a wrench and thinks there's a leak.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz beams himself into Weasel's brain in order to take out Magoo with tranquilliser darts. Magoo loses Mr Cat and enlists his neighbour to find him.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks he's in a triathlon and takes Fizz's superhuman strength headband, which Fizz needs to beat the President at a thumb war

programme.title: Thunderbirds Are Go
programme.desc: John takes a break from his duties aboard Thunderbird 5 to attend a charity event with Lady Penelope - and has to save the day without his Tracy brothers' help when the Hood gatecrashes the party

programme.title: Mighty Mike
programme.desc: Mike realises there's nothing better to impress your crush with than a little magic trick, but things soon get out of hand.

programme.title: Mighty Mike
programme.desc: Mike's special date with Iris is interrupted when the raccoons get fleas and head over to Mike's to find something to relieve their itchiness.

programme.title: Mighty Mike
programme.desc: The raccoons think they will finally be able to steal something from Mike's house when they handcuff Mike's back legs together.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: It's cold, the boiler is broken, and Mr. Bean has to get warm, fast.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean is cajoled by Irma and spurred by jealousy of the fund-raising star Declan into raising money for a donkey sanctuary.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Mavis' teen crush, Jett Black, visits the hotel

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum
programme.desc: Animated series based on the Marvel superheroes team. With the world's weather out of control, the Avengers must break into teams and trek across the globe to shut down the network of Weather Towers that are now under the control of Red Skull. It's a high-stakes adventure with Captain America and War Machine in the desert - with the help of Black Panther and Thor - Iron Man and Justin Hammer in the jungle, and Black Widow, Hulk and Hawkeye in America's farmland.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum
programme.desc: Animated series based on the Marvel superheroes team. Hulk, Black Widow and Hawkeye must protect New York City from a super-storm while Iron Man, Captain America, and Justin Hammer journey to a secret base hidden deep within the ocean to find Red Skull. Captain America is determined to take down Red Skull once and for all, but it will take the teamwork of rivals Iron Man and Justin Hammer to take down AIM, destroy Tony's Weather Machine, and save the world - assuming they can stop arguing...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a pub landlady is crushed to death by a giant box during a magic show organised by famous illusionist Gideon Latimer, pathologist Kate discovers the cables had been deliberately sabotaged. Evangelising curate Andrew Maplin claims the tragedy is God's vengeance for the pagan traditions still held deep in Midsomer Oaks, but Barnaby and Nelson fear Gideon was the real target. Neil Dudgeon, Gwilym Lee and Tamzin Malleson star in the murder mystery, with Joe Absolom, Andrew-Lee Potts, Justin Salinger, Amanda Burton and Stephanie Leonidas

programme.title: Ainsley's Food We Love
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott is joined by Christopher Biggins, Martine McCutcheon and Brian Turner for this Christmas special. On the menu are festive bubble patties, Thai turkey and coconut broth with chilli, coconut and coriander scones, and chocolate bread and butter pudding with spiced cherries. Plus, drinks expert Olly Smith is on hand to knock up some festive tipples, including an alcoholic chocolate milkshake

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: Joel Dommett hosts the return of the singing contest, in which a celebrity panel and a studio audience must guess the famous faces performing behind elaborate costumes. Rita Ora, Jonathan Ross and Davina McCall all return on the panel, joined by newcomer Mo Gilligan, and this opening episode sees the first six mystery celebrities battling it out - Robin v Alien, Swan v Dragon and Sausage v Badger

programme.title: In for a Penny
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show from locations around the UK, setting members of the public unusual challenges

programme.title: Despicable Me (2010)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind hopes to seal his reputation as the greatest villain of them all by stealing the Moon. First he needs to get his hands on a shrinking ray owned by a rival evil genius, and adopts three orphan girls to help him - but finds that fatherhood brings out his long-buried caring side. Animated comedy, with the voices of Steve Carell, Jason Segel, Russell Brand and Julie Andrews

programme.title: Jurassic World (2015)
programme.desc: Decades on from the creation of Jurassic Park, a fully operational attraction filled with genetically engineered dinosaurs has been opened on the island. In need of a new attraction, the company behind the park creates an entirely new species - only for it to escape and terrorise the tourists. Action adventure sequel, starring Chris Pratt and Bryce Dallas Howard

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents an hour of laughs, mistakes and outtakes from the quiz that were never meant to see the light of day. With contributions from chasers Anne Hegerty, Darragh Ennis, Mark Labbett, Jenny Ryan, Paul Sinha and Shaun Wallace

programme.title: The Story of SM:TV Live
programme.desc: Ant and Dec reunite with Cat Deeley to look back on making the Saturday morning kids' show, revisiting the studio where the series was filmed and reminiscing about their favourite segments and running gags, including Wonky Donkey, Chums, and Dec's obsession with Sabrina the Teenage Witch. Featuring classic clips and contributions from guests and celebrity fans, including Kylie Minogue, Stephen Mulhern, Fleur East and Scarlett Moffatt

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Host Jeremy Clarkson turns up the pressure for Prue Leith, Kym Marsh and Ronni Ancona as they try to answer 15 questions with the help of four lifelines to win a million pounds for their chosen charities

programme.title: The Silence of the Lambs (1991)
programme.desc: Trainee FBI agent Clarice Starling is sent to interview an imprisoned psychopath with a taste for eating his victims. The inmate offers to help catch a serial killer who is holding a politician's daughter hostage - but to learn what he knows, Clarice has to engage in his dangerous mind games. Jonathan Demme's Oscar-winning thriller, based on Thomas Harris's novel, starring Jodie Foster, Anthony Hopkins, Scott Glenn and Ted Levine

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: John Neil presents action from Thruxton, including round 11 of the GT4 Supercup and round 13 of the Mini Challenge Trophy

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Make It Pop
programme.desc: The kids get snowed in at MacKendrick and learn the real meaning of Christmas. They also meet Linc, a mysterious new student

programme.title: Wishfart
programme.desc: The city is overtaken by terrifying and delicious hordes of gingerdead cookies. As the trio take shelter, they realise that they must find the cause of the disaster

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean looks back over his life, recalling how he acquired his beloved teddy bear and learned to drive. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: Piers Morgan and Susanna Reid relive the moments created by the real stars of 2020 - celebrating Covid heroes up and down the country, from the likes of Captain Sir Tom to the staff of the NHS who saved so many lives

The Environmental Clean-Up Conference is off to anything but a smooth start when Tony Stark realises that his fellow competitor is his rival Justin Hammer, but when a mysterious saboteur turns the inventions at the conference against the scientists there, it's up to Iron Man to save the day. At the same time, Captain America finally has a day off but cannot decide what to do with his free time - then the forces of AIM attack...

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum
programme.desc: Animated series based on the Marvel superhero team. A high-tech, high-speed chase through the streets of New York City breaks out when Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk try to recover Tony Stark's Weather Machine from AIM, but The Avengers soon find themselves fighting not only Detroit Steel and the forces of AIM, but also an old foe from Captain America's past - Red Skull!

programme.title: The Story of SM:TV Live
programme.desc: Ant and Dec reunite with Cat Deeley to look back on making the Saturday morning kids' show, revisiting the studio where the series was filmed and reminiscing about their favourite segments and running gags, including Wonky Donkey, Chums, and Dec's obsession with Sabrina the Teenage Witch. Featuring classic clips and contributions from guests and celebrity fans, including Kylie Minogue, Stephen Mulhern, Fleur East and Scarlett Moffatt

programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: For the first time ever on Christmas Day, James invites viewers around to his house and kicks off the day's celebrations in style, serving up a feast of festive food and entertainment for guests Denise Van Outen and Chris Evans. He is joined in the kitchen by The Ritz's head chef John Williams, and Bake Off Creme De La Creme winner Mark Tilling treats viewers to some of his deliciously decadent chocolate creations

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of the 3.00 Ladbrokes King George VI Steeple Chase from Kempton Park, which follows races at 1.15, 1.50 and 2.25. Plus, the 2.05 Rowland Meyrick Handicap Chase from Wetherby. With analysis from AP McCoy and Mick Fitzgerald, reports by Oli Bell, Luke Harvey and Matt Chapman, and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Shrek the Halls
programme.desc: Festive animated short featuring the full whimsical cast of the hit film series. Shrek settles down for a quiet Christmas with Fiona and the babies, but Donkey and the ogre's other friends have their own ideas - and the party soon descends into chaos. Featuring the voices of Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Back in 2011, McFly singer Tom Fletcher faced the Cube, while his bandmates watched on. Now it's Danny Jones and Dougie Poynter's turn. Can they beat Tom's impressive winnings of £100,000? They're not the only ones appearing tonight, however. Actress and comedian Emily Atack and her mum, the impressionist Kate Robbins, also tackle the various tasks of mental agility and physical ability in a bid to win a quarter of a million for their chosen charities. Presented by Phillip Schofield

programme.title: In for a Penny
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern is in Bath for this festive special, challenging Christmas shoppers with a series of challenges to win £1,000 and a holiday. The show features popular regular rounds including Mum's The Word, Pump It Up, Cross Dressing and Driving Me Round The Bend, alongside an ice-skating challenge and trying to guess the identity of a mysterious celebrity Santa

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Tim Lovejoy, Kay Burley, Eni Aluko and Richard Herring pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential charity prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: Joel Dommett hosts the return of the singing contest, in which a celebrity panel and a studio audience must guess the famous faces performing behind elaborate costumes. Rita Ora, Jonathan Ross, Davina McCall all return on the panel, joined by newcomer Mo Gilligan, and this opening episode sees the first six mystery celebrities battling it out - Robin v Alien, Swan v Dragon and Sausage v Badger

programme.title: Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing head judge Shirley Ballas introduces her family, who take on Irish model and TV presenter Vogue Williams, her husband Spencer Matthews and their clan, for a chance to win a £30,000 jackpot prize for charity. Presented by Gino D'Acampo

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Good Morning Britain anchor Piers Morgan and Diversity's Jordan Banjo take up the challenge, hoping to win as much as £1million for their chosen charities. As ever, lifelines including Phone a Friend, Ask the Host and 50-50 are available to them if they get stuck. Presented by Jeremy Clarkson

programme.title: The Holiday (2006)
programme.desc: Two single women living on opposite sides of the Atlantic agree to exchange houses over the Christmas holidays. In their new surroundings, both women unexpectedly encounter prospective partners, but as the house swap draws to a close, difficult decisions have to be made about their blossoming relationships. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Kate Winslet, Jack Black, Jude Law and Eli Wallach

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum
programme.desc: Animated series based on the Marvel superheroes team. With the world's weather out of control, the Avengers must break into teams and trek across the globe to shut down the network of Weather Towers that are now under the control of Red Skull. It's a high-stakes adventure with Captain America and War Machine in the desert - with the help of Black Panther and Thor - Iron Man and Justin Hammer in the jungle, and Black Widow, Hulk and Hawkeye in America's farmland.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum
programme.desc: Animated series based on the Marvel superheroes team. Hulk, Black Widow and Hawkeye must protect New York City from a super-storm while Iron Man, Captain America, and Justin Hammer journey to a secret base hidden deep within the ocean to find Red Skull. Captain America is determined to take down Red Skull once and for all, but it will take the teamwork of rivals Iron Man and Justin Hammer to take down AIM, destroy Tony's Weather Machine, and save the world - assuming they can stop arguing...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a pub landlady is crushed to death by a giant box during a magic show organised by famous illusionist Gideon Latimer, pathologist Kate discovers the cables had been deliberately sabotaged. Evangelising curate Andrew Maplin claims the tragedy is God's vengeance for the pagan traditions still held deep in Midsomer Oaks, but Barnaby and Nelson fear Gideon was the real target. Neil Dudgeon, Gwilym Lee and Tamzin Malleson star in the murder mystery, with Joe Absolom, Andrew-Lee Potts, Justin Salinger, Amanda Burton and Stephanie Leonidas

Plus, drinks expert Olly Smith is on hand to knock up some festive tipples, including an alcoholic chocolate milkshake

programme.desc: Cleveland is head-hunted by Stoolbend's Preservation Society to help the great-great-grandson of the town's founding father save its historic park - and soon sets about rewriting history

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Cleveland discovers his parents have been selling all his childhood possessions in an effort to reclaim money they lost to a conman. Desperate to set things right, he enlists the aid of his friends to get revenge on the swindler

programme.title: Crossing Swords
programme.desc: Patrick lands a coveted squire's position at the royal castle, but his dream job becomes a nightmare. Animated fantasy comedy, with the voice of Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Crossing Swords
programme.desc: Patrick is enlisted to carry out an execution aimed at improving King Merriman's sagging poll numbers. Animated fantasy comedy, with the voice of Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Shopping with Keith Lemon
programme.desc: Keith Lemon stocks up on food and drink with Richard Madeley, and goes to a Christmas tree farm with Alison Hammond. He also tries tobogganing with Joe Swash and Stacey Solomon, and bakes yuletide treats with Paloma Faith

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at some of the most outrageous moments from the animated comedy following the misadventures of America's disaster-prone Griffin family. Featuring interviews with the show's creator Seth MacFarlane

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In London, Amanda, Katy and Alex battle it out to impress Georgina with their style choices. With nothing but their chosen outfits to help her decide, who will Georgina choose to take out on a first date?

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: Matt Edmondson narrates a selection of some of the most incredible and peculiar record-breaking attempts, featuring the longest motorcycle jump, the loudest burp and the tightest parallel parking. He also reveals the oddest record in the book

programme.title: ITV2 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: Matt Edmonds presents more weird and wonderful Guinness World Records, including the most vehicles to run over a person and the most eggs carried on a single hat

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates another round of viewer-submitted comedy clips, as captured via smartphone, drone and CCTV. This time, a hoverboard destroys an office, a man falls through a casino ceiling, and an ostrich takes a shine to a young child's mobile phone

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill slips free of his bonds for a special programme, breaking out his favourite disasters for another chance to run amok on TV. Who will be in his sights this time? Clips include themes of parties, ditzy damsels and webcam woes.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... A Castle Story
programme.desc: Ant and Dec and the cast of 2020 take a look back at the highs and lows of their experience. Cameras focus on some of those tasks which pushed the likes of Jordan North, Shane Richie and Vernon Kay to their limits. Plus, a look at Giovanna Fletcher's success as Queen of the Castle

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: Joel Dommett hosts the return of the singing contest, in which a celebrity panel and a studio audience must guess the famous faces performing behind elaborate costumes. Rita Ora, Jonathan Ross, Davina McCall all return on the panel, joined by newcomer Mo Gilligan, and this opening episode sees the first six mystery celebrities battling it out - Robin v Alien, Swan v Dragon and Sausage v Badger

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show, asking Strictly head judge Shirley Ballas, actress Bhavna Limbachia and This Morning's resident GP Dr Ranj Singh to 'see it and say it' as they try to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues. The players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000 for their chosen charities

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring a man falling off a bridge into a canal, a lion jumping inside a car on safari and a student finding an unwelcome surprise in her toilet. Plus, Peter Stringfellow uses a paintball gun to fire Viagra, Harry reveals the real reason Zayn left One Direction and Caitlin Moran falls off a catamaran. Narrated by Harry Hill

Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Smith, Robert De Niro, Martin Scorsese, Renee Zellweger, Angelina Jolie and Jack Black

programme.title: Family Guy

programme.title: Family Guy

programme.title: Family Guy

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger helps Francine with her terrible cooking by bringing her to a remote Patagonian island. Stan gets a nail in his head and can't speak.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Steve looks after Roger's ex-tumour Rogu to prove to Francine that he is ready for the responsibility of babysitting

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Steve helps Stan fix a problem with his office computer, but feels slighted by his father's colleagues when they claim he isn't 'CIA material'. Then he is approached by the NSA, the CIA's nerdy arch-rivals, who make him an offer he cannot refuse. Meanwhile, committed vegetarian Hayley accidentally eats meat, and realises she still loves the taste

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Lester appears to take his own life after losing his savings when he invests in Cleveland's beer truck business. Meanwhile, tired of having his hair cut by his mother, Rallo opens a barbershop in the kitchen

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Donna becomes jealous when a slimmer, prettier version of Cleveland's former school friend 'Fatty Patty' turns up and reveals she has a crush on him. However, the newcomer goes crazy and tries to steal Cleveland's 'essence', forcing Donna to intervene

programme.title: Final Destination (2000)

programme.title: George and Mildred

programme.title: George and Mildred

programme.title: Mutiny on the Buses (1972)
programme.desc: Chirpy bus driver Stan Butler lands himself in trouble as he struggles to raise enough money to marry his girlfriend, and on top of training his unemployed brother-in-law for a job at the depot he has to contend with an officious new manager. Comedy based on the sitcom, starring Reg Varney, Stephen Lewis, Bob Grant, Michael Robbins, Anna Karen and Doris Hare

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Ross Kemp plays loan shark Eddie Scrooge, whose legendary cruelty strikes fear into the hearts of the poor borrowers who live on his crumbling estate. Anticipating a profitable Christmas Day - when his clients will all be at home - he is shocked, and none too pleased, by the appearance the night before of his deceased business partner Jacob Marley. Worse still, the grim ghost is on a mission to show Eddie the error of his ways in a terrifying journey through the past, present and future. Also starring Warren Mitchell, Ray Fearon and Liz Smith

programme.title: Carry On Abroad (1972)
programme.desc: British holiday-makers jet off on a package holiday to the Spanish resort of Elsbels. Unluckily, not only is the hotel short of staff, but it also has no walls, ceilings or entertainment. Further mishaps leave the tourists fuming - until they sample a local punch laced with an aphrodisiac. Comedy, with Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: Carry On Matron (1972)
programme.desc: A wily thief gathers a band of crooks for a plot to break into a maternity hospital and steal the supply of contraceptive pills. One of the gang gets the lie of the land by disguising himself as a nurse, but the hypochondriac head doctor and formidable matron prove constant obstacles to the heist. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On at Your Convenience (1971)
programme.desc: Production at toilet manufacturers WC Boggs is brought to a halt when an over-eager trade union representative calls a strike. However, worker unrest is quickly quelled by a jolly trip to the seaside. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Cope, Hattie Jacques, Joan Sims, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Carry On Behind (1975)
programme.desc: Professors Ronald Crump and Anna Vooshka embark on an archaeological dig, but find their efforts disrupted by the saucy shenanigans of a motley bunch of holiday-makers in the neighbouring caravan park. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Elke Sommer, Joan Sims, Windsor Davies, Kenneth Connor and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Carry On Camping (1969)
programme.desc: Two men lure their unsuspecting girlfriends to a nudist camp, with hopes of having a wild old time - but the joke is on the men when it turns out they have ended up at a traditional family campsite. Bawdy comedy, starring Sid James, Bernard Bresslaw, Kenneth Williams, Joan Sims and Barbara Windsor

programme.title: Carry On Dick (1974)
programme.desc: Two officers of the law dedicated to catching a cheeky highwayman enlist the help of a vicar, unaware the pious pastor and his buxom housemaid are not as innocent as they seem to be. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Jack Douglas, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Bresslaw, Joan Sims and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Doctor (1967)
programme.desc: A popular doctor is sacked after a misunderstanding ruins his reputation, prompting the furious patients to stage a revolt against the luckless medic's strait-laced superiors. Meanwhile, the hospital head has his own problems after becoming the unlikely romantic target of a strict matron. Comedy, with Frankie Howerd, Jim Dale, Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Girls (1973)
programme.desc: The council of a seaside town is in dire need of a means to attract tourists to its resort, so announces a beauty contest. While the conniving organiser plots a series of publicity stunts, an outraged feminist group plans to sabotage the event. Comedy, starring Sid James, June Whitfield, Joan Sims, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Bresslaw and Peter Butterworth

programme.title: Carry On Henry (1971)
programme.desc: King Henry VIII plots to rid himself of his new French wife when her craving for garlic becomes too much to cope with. However, he cannot afford to anger the king of France, and tries to make it look as if his queen has had an affair. Comedy, starring Sid James, Joan Sims, Kenneth Williams, Terry Scott, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor and Kenneth Connor

programme.title: Holiday on the Buses (1973)
programme.desc: Bus driver Stan and conductor Jack are fired and wind up working at a holiday camp in Wales, where they fall foul of the security officer - none other than their old adversary Inspector Blake, who has also lost his job and been forced into alternative employment. Comedy based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Anna Karen and Doris Hare

programme.title: On the Buses (1971)
programme.desc: Wily bus driver Stan Butler thinks a new company policy that allows women behind the wheel will rob him of his precious overtime money. Enlisting the aid of conductor Jack, he does everything he can to sabotage the plan. Comedy, based on the TV series, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Doris Hare, Peter Madden and Anna Karen

programme.title: Carry On Cruising (1962)
programme.desc: The captain of a cruise ship bound for the Mediterranean is less than impressed when five of his regular shipmates are replaced at the last minute. Despite their best efforts to earn his respect and an eagerness to please, the new recruits seem doomed to cause chaos whatever they do. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Liz Fraser and Kenneth Connor

programme.title: Carry On Loving (1970)
programme.desc: A couple who run a dating agency find themselves inundated with customers, and end up arranging a selection of very unlikely matches - while also contending with their own marital difficulties. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Bernard Bresslaw, Joan Sims and Terry Scott

programme.title: Carry On Again Doctor (1969)
programme.desc: A disgraced surgeon sets up a clinic in the hope of promoting a supposedly miraculous slimming potion made from secret ingredients discovered on a remote tropical island. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Jim Dale, Barbara Windsor, Charles Hawtrey, Hattie Jacques, Pat Coombs and Joan Sims

programme.title: Carry On Jack (1963)
programme.desc: A bumbling midshipman's uniform is stolen by a woman desperate to go to sea, who adopts his identity. Later, the hapless sailor is press-ganged on to the same ship as her. However, while trying to prove who he really is, he has to contend with mutinies, pirates and the Spanish Navy. Comedy, with Bernard Cribbins, Juliet Mills, Kenneth Williams and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: Carry On Don't Lose Your Head (1966)
programme.desc: A cunning English nobleman puts his talent for disguise to good use by rescuing aristocrats from execution during the French Revolution. However, the leader of the secret police is determined to unmask the elusive hero spiriting the nobility out from under the guillotine. Comedy spoof of the Scarlet Pimpernel story, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Joan Sims, Jim Dale and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: Carry On Screaming (1966)
programme.desc: A sinister boffin, his sultry sister and two genetic misfits kidnap innocent women from spooky Hocomb Woods and turn them into mannequins - but two dim-witted detectives look set to throw a spanner in the works. Comedy horror, starring Kenneth Williams, Fenella Fielding, Harry H Corbett, Charles Hawtrey, Jim Dale, Joan Sims and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Carry On Cleo (1964)
programme.desc: A captured Briton is mistaken for a heroic swordsman and promoted to the Roman Royal Guard, with orders to protect Julius Caesar. But the last thing he and the fated emperor expect is an assassination attempt from within Caesar's own circle of friends. Comedy, starring Amanda Barrie, Kenneth Williams, Sid James, Kenneth Connor, Jim Dale, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: On the Buses (1971)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis struggle to determine whether a death during a college-based clinical trial for a new antidepressant was murder or suicide, and receive little assistance from the institution's evasive psychiatric professor. A second student's demise then leads to the revelation that the trial's participants are all operating under the influence of a mind-altering drug, and that the lines between love, obsession and madness have become dangerously blurred. Guest starring Douglas Henshall (Primeval), Lucy Liemann (Rev) and Thomas Brodie Sangster (Love Actually)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate the murder of a businesswoman connected with an organisation that supports gifted children, who had apparently been blackmailing the father of one particularly promising youngster. Further deaths follow, and as the body count rises, they realise there is a decades-old secret at the heart of the case. Matters are complicated still further by the presence in Oxford of former MI5 spymaster Grace Orde, who is visiting to sign copies of her tell-all memoir - which provides a vital clue to the killer's identity. Detective drama, guest starring Anna Chancellor and Cherie Lunghi, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective investigates after a botanist accidentally unearths the body of a recently buried professor who was fixated upon solving a seemingly impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. The victim had a long-standing rivalry with his brother - giving Lewis and Hathaway an obvious suspect - but the case is hindered by the mind games of two students who seem intent on causing trouble in their quest to gain admittance to a mysterious club. Guest starring Celia Imrie and James Fleet, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A professor feels humiliated when her internet dating video is leaked onto a website and watched by her students. The next morning she is found dead, the victim of what appears to be a straightforward suicide. However, Lewis is not convinced and digs deeper, identifying several suspects including the site's founder - but as he and Hathaway get closer to the truth amid a rising death toll, they find their personal and professional lives dredged up online for all to see. Guest starring Roxanne McKee (Game of Thrones) and Toby Stephens (Die Another Day), with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A man's apparent suicide in an armoured car shocks the village of Morton Fendle, but things take a more sinister turn upon the discovery he was not alone when he died. Top of Barnaby and Jones's list of suspects is the victim's missing girlfriend - whose mysterious hold over the war-blighted residents could provide the key to the mystery. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. In time-honoured fashion, it initially looks as though the butler did it - but subsequent inquiries throw up a veritable rogues' gallery of equally likely suspects. Philip Jackson, David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jenny's younger brother Steve pays a visit, and soon begins to threaten her relationship with Merton. Meanwhile, David sets his sights on joining a mod gang causing havoc in the village. Sarah Tansey, Thom Fell, Maureen O'Brien and Robert East star

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: As Brent Park Cricket Club prepare for the opening ceremony of their new pitch and pavilion, Mim arranges a big surprise for Rog - but disaster is waiting in the wings. Comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.desc: Two officers of the law dedicated to catching a cheeky highwayman enlist the help of a vicar, unaware the pious pastor and his buxom housemaid are not as innocent as they seem to be. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Jack Douglas, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Bresslaw, Joan Sims and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Carry On Doctor (1967)
programme.desc: A popular doctor is sacked after a misunderstanding ruins his reputation, prompting the furious patients to stage a revolt against the luckless medic's strait-laced superiors. Meanwhile, the hospital head has his own problems after becoming the unlikely romantic target of a strict matron. Comedy, with Frankie Howerd, Jim Dale, Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Hattie Jacques

While the conniving organiser plots a series of publicity stunts, an outraged feminist group plans to sabotage the event. Comedy, starring Sid James, June Whitfield, Joan Sims, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Bresslaw and Peter Butterworth

programme.desc: King Henry VIII plots to rid himself of his new French wife when her craving for garlic becomes too much to cope with. However, he cannot afford to anger the king of France, and tries to make it look as if his queen has had an affair. Comedy, starring Sid James, Joan Sims, Kenneth Williams, Terry Scott, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor and Kenneth Connor

Comedy based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant, Stephen Lewis, Anna Karen and Doris Hare

Comedy spoof of the Scarlet Pimpernel story, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Joan Sims, Jim Dale and Charles Hawtrey

Comedy horror, starring Kenneth Williams, Fenella Fielding, Harry H Corbett, Charles Hawtrey, Jim Dale, Joan Sims and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis struggle to determine whether a death during a college-based clinical trial for a new antidepressant was murder or suicide, and receive little assistance from the institution's evasive psychiatric professor. A second student's demise then leads to the revelation that the trial's participants are all operating under the influence of a mind-altering drug, and that the lines between love, obsession and madness have become dangerously blurred. Guest starring Douglas Henshall (Primeval), Lucy Liemann (Rev) and Thomas Brodie Sangster (Love Actually)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate the murder of a businesswoman connected with an organisation that supports gifted children, who had apparently been blackmailing the father of one particularly promising youngster. Further deaths follow, and as the body count rises, they realise there is a decades-old secret at the heart of the case. Matters are complicated still further by the presence in Oxford of former MI5 spymaster Grace Orde, who is visiting to sign copies of her tell-all memoir - which provides a vital clue to the killer's identity. Detective drama, guest starring Anna Chancellor and Cherie Lunghi, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective investigates after a botanist accidentally unearths the body of a recently buried professor who was fixated upon solving a seemingly impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. The victim had a long-standing rivalry with his brother - giving Lewis and Hathaway an obvious suspect - but the case is hindered by the mind games of two students who seem intent on causing trouble in their quest to gain admittance to a mysterious club. Guest starring Celia Imrie and James Fleet, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A professor feels humiliated when her internet dating video is leaked onto a website and watched by her students. The next morning she is found dead, the victim of what appears to be a straightforward suicide. However, Lewis is not convinced and digs deeper, identifying several suspects including the site's founder - but as he and Hathaway get closer to the truth amid a rising death toll, they find their personal and professional lives dredged up online for all to see. Guest starring Roxanne McKee (Game of Thrones) and Toby Stephens (Die Another Day), with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A man's apparent suicide in an armoured car shocks the village of Morton Fendle, but things take a more sinister turn upon the discovery he was not alone when he died. Top of Barnaby and Jones's list of suspects is the victim's missing girlfriend - whose mysterious hold over the war-blighted residents could provide the key to the mystery. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. In time-honoured fashion, it initially looks as though the butler did it - but subsequent inquiries throw up a veritable rogues' gallery of equally likely suspects. Philip Jackson, David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star

programme.title: Bad Move
programme.desc: Steve is chosen to play a key role in The Lantern Man Festival - an annual village tradition, just as Nicky's daughter Zoe decides to come and stay with them after splitting up with her boyfriend. When Zoe takes a shine to the local bad lad Bronson, Nicky and Steve have to do their best to stop a romance blossoming. Meanwhile, as Steve is made to don a ceremonial cloak and drag a straw figure through the village, disastrous events unfold at the fireworks display. Starring Jack Dee and Kerry Godliman

programme.title: Billy Connolly's Great American Trail
programme.desc: Billy's final leg begins in Virginia on the trail of bootleggers dealing in moonshine before he hears the story of the amazing woman who led hundreds of slaves to their freedom. He stops off at a farm where he encounters bizarre heads of all the US presidents, learns about the opioid crisis - the biggest epidemic in American history - and visits the backroom of flamboyant designer Manuel Cuuevas, who was responsible for dressing rock stars including Elvis, Cher and the Beatles. The comedian's tour finally ends in Nashville at the home of country music, the Grand Ole Opry
