programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's hopes for a merry Christmas are dashed by Mr Burns' refusal to pay a holiday bonus, so he decides to earn extra cash by getting a job as a department store Santa Claus. First-ever episode of the long-running animated comedy series

programme.title: Two by Two (2015)
programme.desc: Two strange creatures and their children are barred from getting on board Noah's Ark, but manage to sneak in. When the kids fall overboard, they face a struggle for survival as the flood waters rise, while their distraught parents must work together to rescue them. Animated adventure, with the voices of Tara Flynn and Dermot Magennis

programme.title: Garfield 2: A Tale of Two Kitties (2006)
programme.desc: The lazy moggy stows away in his owner's luggage and ends up in London. He is promptly mistaken for an English upper-class cat, who has recently inherited a grand estate, and moves into his stately home - much to the dismay of the real aristocratic feline's conniving relation, who is bent on swindling him out of his money. Family comedy, starring Breckin Meyer, Billy Connolly and Jennifer Love Hewitt, with the voices of Bill Murray and Tim Curry

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Four tales celebrating the festive season. Bart hatches a plan to hold Santa Claus hostage, while in a 1940s-set story, Lisa refuses to give in to the holiday spirit until her mother returns home safe from the Battle of the Bulge. Home improvement expert Martha Stewart helps a desperate Marge, and Katy Perry leads the family in a rendition of The 39 Days of Christmas

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Guilt-stricken at having spent all the family's Christmas money on himself, Homer resolves to turn over a new leaf and become a do-gooder - but his kindness soon starts to rival that of Ned Flanders, and the neighbours embark on a battle for supremacy

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty tries to impress his daughter as they spend Christmas with the Simpsons, Reverend Lovejoy seeks converts after church attendance plummets, and Maggie is haunted by a spooky Christmas toy

programme.title: The Tiger Who Came to Tea
programme.desc: Hand-drawn animated version of Judith Kerr's much-loved tale, which celebrated its 50th anniversary in 2018. A tea-guzzling tiger turns up unannounced and eats and drinks young Sophie and her mummy out of everything in the house, even draining the water from their taps. Narrated by David Walliams, with David Oyelowo providing the voice for the big cat alongside seven-year-old Clara Ross as Sophie, with other characters played by Benedict Cumberbatch, Tamsin Greig and Paul Whitehouse

programme.title: The Snowman
programme.desc: Raymond Briggs' festive favourite, a wordless animated fantasy telling the story of a small boy whose snowman magically comes to life and whisks him off on the journey of a lifetime to the North Pole. Howard Blake's score includes the award-winning song Walking in the Air, which was taken to number five in the charts by a young Aled Jones, but is here sung by Peter Auty

programme.title: Father Christmas
programme.desc: Festive animation based on the book by Raymond Briggs, focusing on Santa's leisurely life on the other 364 days of the year, before he sets off for his annual gift-giving sleigh ride. With the voice of Mel Smith

programme.title: The Snowman and the Snowdog
programme.desc: Animated sequel to Raymond Briggs' classic festive tale The Snowman, telling the story of another youngster's magical Christmas. A boy's snowman and snowdog come to life at the stroke of midnight and take him on an adventure to the North Pole, where he and his new companions meet an assortment of colourful characters, including Santa himself, before returning home - where a wonderful surprise awaits

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood, Prue Leith and Matt Lucas are joined by Tom Allen to celebrate Christmas in the famous white tent. Joining in the festivities are Jamie and Rosie from 2019, Ruby from 2018 and James from 2017, all back and ready to battle in the festive fight for the Christmas Star Baker title. Plus, Alexandra Burke performs her magical version of Silent Night

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including holiday weather

programme.title: The Alternative Christmas Message
programme.desc: In this comedic parody of the Christmas Day address, 'The Queen' speaks plainly and from the heart to reveal what she and Philip have been up to in lockdown, and offers a demonstration of her new TikTok dance routine. She says the theme of her Christmas message is 'trust', and warns viewers to question whether what they see and hear is always as it seems. In 2020, the message is a stark warning about the advanced technology that is enabling the proliferation of misinformation and fake news in a digital age. First airing in 1993, the Channel 4 Christmas message - the alternative to the Queen's annual televised message to the nation - has previously featured an illustrious and varied selection of presenters, including whistleblower Edward Snowden, the Rev Jesse Jackson, Doreen and Neville Lawrence, The Simpsons and Danny Dyer

programme.title: The Italian Job (1969)
programme.desc: A crook assembles a motley gang to steal £4million in gold bullion from an Italian armoured car, which brings Turin to a standstill and enables the robbers to make a quick getaway in a fleet of Minis - but they end up falling foul of the Mafia along the way. Crime comedy, starring Michael Caine, Noel Coward, Benny Hill, Tony Beckley and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry

programme.title: Quentin Blake's Clown
programme.desc: Animation, based on the book by Quentin Blake, bringing to life the adventures of a little toy clown, thrown away with a load of old discarded items, as he goes on a journey to find a new loving home for himself and his friends. His journey takes him through the helter-skelter streets of the city, dodging scary dogs and even scarier adults. He even finds himself mistaken for a child and performs in a school Christmas assembly. However, each time Clown thinks he might just have found a perfect new owner, and his hopes start to rise, he gets thrown away again

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick, Angel, Dorothy and Arthur, as well as Angel's parents Jenni and Steve prepare to celebrate a family Christmas in France. With an old 19th-century chateau ledger found in the attic and classic cookbooks to hand, the Strawbridges take inspiration from Christmases past, discovering what food, festivities, gifts and games would have been like in bygone eras. Dick and Angel's imagination goes into overdrive as they create a winter wonderland with an ice rink at its heart. Later, as the family settles down to dinner, so the sound of traditional hand bells rings out across the chateau and they wonder if their exploration of the past will create chateau traditions for the future

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Opinionated viewers the Siddiquis, Giles and Mary, Jenny and Lee, Ellie and Izzi, Mary and Marina, and Amira and Iqra look back on the year's biggest and best shows, including Strictly Come Dancing, Countdown, This Morning, Yorkshire Tea vs PG Tips: Battle of the Brews, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat, CBeebies Bedtime Stories, The Undoing, First Dates, Borat Subsequent Moviefilm, Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Elephant, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown and Naked Attraction

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix and his team head for the British countryside to celebrate love in the most festive of locations, where 28-year-old Holly goes on a date with 32-year-old Shane. Elsewhere, Paul, who has never had a boyfriend, is set up with 35-year-old IT worker Alex from London, and Shauna and James, who are both from Dewsbury, enjoy a festive date

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994)
programme.desc: A London man's misfortunes in love look set to change when he meets an American beauty. However, the prospect of a transatlantic relationship succeeding seems slim, so the pair go their separate ways - only for him to realise he is unable to get her out of his mind. Richard Curtis's comedy, with Hugh Grant, Andie MacDowell, John Hannah, Charlotte Coleman, Kristin Scott Thomas, Simon Callow and James Fleet

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Christmas hit-makers Maizie Williams of Boney M and Jona Lewie are joined by soul singer VV Brown and DJ Toby Anstis for a week of festive dinner parties as they compete to win £1,000 for charity. Highlights include the guests dressing up as aliens, space girls and donkeys, some saucy secret Santa gifts, camel rides, and a very special 'Queen's speech'

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: Festive crafters are desperate to win Kirstie's best jumper competition in a show that features tips on how to save and update tired knitwear. Plus, some terrific terrazzo and two seasonal mini-makes that are simple and fun to create

programme.title: The Alternative Christmas Message
programme.desc: In this comedic parody of the Christmas Day address, 'The Queen' speaks plainly and from the heart to reveal what she and Philip have been up to in lockdown, and offers a demonstration of her new TikTok dance routine. She says the theme of her Christmas message is 'trust', and warns viewers to question whether what they see and hear is always as it seems. In 2020, the message is a stark warning about the advanced technology that is enabling the proliferation of misinformation and fake news in a digital age. First airing in 1993, the Channel 4 Christmas message - the alternative to the Queen's annual televised message to the nation - has previously featured an illustrious and varied selection of presenters, including whistleblower Edward Snowden, the Rev Jesse Jackson, Doreen and Neville Lawrence, The Simpsons and Danny Dyer

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Handicrafts enthusiast Kirstie Allsopp is challenged to prepare decorations for Amy and Craig's vintage-inspired wedding. She works to create military-themed crafts coupled with retro flower arrangements

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: A church carnival leads Missy to try out for the baseball team. Meemaw struggles after her break-up with Dr Sturgis. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage, Raegan Revord and Annie Potts

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster starts an internet flame war, and Missy stands up to the boys on her baseball team. Elsewhere, Meemaw is unhappy when George Sr spends time with her new boyfriend

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The university makes a lucrative job offer to George Sr in the hope of recruiting Sheldon. Meanwhile, Georgie starts working for Meemaw's new boyfriend, and Mary is determined to rid her home of greed

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer acquires a pet monkey to help him with his chores, while Bart begins co-hosting a children's news programme with Lisa - and decides to take a leaf out of Kent Brockman's book, cynically concentrating on human interest stories in a bid to boost his own popularity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer acquires a pet monkey to help him with his chores, while Bart begins co-hosting a children's news programme with Lisa - and decides to take a leaf out of Kent Brockman's book, cynically concentrating on human interest stories in a bid to boost his own popularity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge are accused of being bad parents and sent to a special class to resolve the problem, resulting in Bart, Lisa and Maggie being placed in the care of Ned Flanders - who promptly decides to have them baptised

programme.title: The Little Penguin Pororo's Racing Adventure (2013)
programme.desc: A penguin's dull life takes an unexpected turn when a plane flown by two turtles lands in his peaceful village. He accompanies them on a journey to the frozen city of Northpia, where he hopes to pursue his dream of becoming a champion sled racer. Animated adventure, with the voices of Zhan Jia and Rob Schneider

programme.title: Capture the Flag (2015)
programme.desc: A young surfer and his friends try to prevent a devious plan to change the course of history when a ruthless billionaire sets out to stop the moon landings from happening, so that he can gain control of a valuable energy source. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Sam Fink, Phillipa Alexander and Lorraine Pilkington

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy pulls out all the stops as she hosts a traditional Victorian Christmas Eve dinner for the friends. Meanwhile, Raj's father comes to visit, and the guys do their best to free a bird they accidentally let into the university clean room. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is horrified at Marge's attempts to make him befriend Ralph Wiggum - until he learns his police chief dad has a master key to every shop in Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse vie for the coveted role of costumed sidekick Fallout Boy in a new feature film about their comic-book hero Radioactive Man. Featuring the guest voice of Mickey Rooney

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family visits an exclusive country club, but its swanky atmosphere has a disturbing effect on Marge, forcing Homer to bring her back down to earth. Featuring the guest voice of golfer Tom Kite

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett

programme.title: Quentin Blake's Clown
programme.desc: Animation, based on the book by Quentin Blake, bringing to life the adventures of a little toy clown, thrown away with a load of old discarded items, as he goes on a journey to find a new loving home for himself and his friends. His journey takes him through the helter-skelter streets of the city, dodging scary dogs and even scarier adults. He even finds himself mistaken for a child and performs in a school Christmas assembly. However, each time Clown thinks he might just have found a perfect new owner, and his hopes start to rise, he gets thrown away again

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking at Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver gets creative and makes a pie that embraces whatever remains from the Christmas dinner. Melting down all the leftover bits and pieces from the cheeseboard, he creates the simplest retro fondue we can make in minutes. And smashing up the leftover mince pies and Christmas pudding, the chef rolls up a treat with his 'anything goes' strudel

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Hidden Figures (2016)
programme.desc: As the space race reaches fever pitch in the early 1960s, a trio of female African-American mathematicians attempt to overcome prejudice and find work with NASA. Their remarkable skills prove vital in getting an astronaut into orbit and bringing him safely back to Earth, but to realise their potential they must overcome deep-seated prejudice in the space programme and society as a whole. Fact-based drama, starring Taraji P Henson, Octavia Spencer, Janelle Monae and Kevin Costner

programme.title: Big Fat Quiz of the Year 2020
programme.desc: Question-master Jimmy Carr is joined by a panel of celebrity quizzers - James Acaster, Stacey Solomon, David Mitchell, Maya Jama, Richard Ayoade and Joe Lycett - who compete to find out who remembers the most about the past 12 months. Jimmy is helped by Jon Snow, Charles Dance, Mitchell Brook Primary School and a host of celebrity question-setters to find the funny in 2020

programme.title: One Night in Hamleys
programme.desc: Three comedians get to live out their childhood fantasies by spending the night in London's famous toy shop, with no security guards to keep them out of mischief. The comics face a series of ridiculous festive games and challenges with only two rules - nobody is allowed to go to sleep and anything they break, they have to pay for

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: A festive celebrity special of the culinary competition, featuring actress Danniella Westbrook, who hopes to get everyone into the celebratory spirit by throwing a panto party, while 1980s pop star Sinitta vies with choreographer Louie Spence for the affections of Made in Chelsea heart-throb Hugo Taylor. Sinitta has her work cut out though, especially as her own food offering may actually be inedible

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. The McQueens continue to guess who is blackmailing them. Meanwhile, Edward has a plan to make sure that Tony never sees his family again

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp joins jewellery-maker Rachel Jeffrey to help a soon-to-be-married couple create their own wedding rings, and learns how gold can revive an old picture frame at little cost

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Mary gets Pastor Jeff involved when Sheldon is not invited to Billy's birthday party, while George Sr has male-bonding time with Dr Sturgis

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to fake an illness to avoid a swimming test at school. Meanwhile, Dr Sturgis attempts to spy on Meemaw's new boyfriend. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Pastor Jeff and Robin make hesitant plans to marry, seeking Mary 's help for a cheap, small, bare-bones wedding. George Sr and Meemaw struggle to manage the Cooper household, while Missy flushes a fried chicken down the toilet which causes it to overflow. US comedy, with Lance Barner, Annie Potts and Zoe Perry

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Pastor Jeff and Robin make hesitant plans to marry, seeking Mary 's help for a cheap, small, bare-bones wedding. George Sr and Meemaw struggle to manage the Cooper household, while Missy flushes a fried chicken down the toilet which causes it to overflow. US comedy, with Lance Barner, Annie Potts and Zoe Perry

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The couple prepare to celebrate their first Christmas together, but Mike struggles to find the perfect gift for Molly. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Bad news at work in the run-up to Christmas leaves Molly unable to get into the festive spirit. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy and Billy Gardell

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie (2004)
programme.desc: The plucky sea creature sets out to prove his boss Mr Krabs is innocent of stealing Neptune's crown. However, the missing item has ended up in sinister Shell City, which all sea-dwellers fear and from which few have ever returned. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny, Bill Fagerbakke, Clancy Brown and Scarlett Johansson, plus a cameo appearance by David Hasselhoff

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job as an estate agent, but her honesty with potential buyers costs her lucrative sales and gets her into hot water with the boss, who issues an ultimatum. The Flanders agree to buy one of the agency's houses - unaware of the property's gruesome past

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner takes the school's underachieving pupils on a trip to ensure they miss a standard test and unexpectedly finds himself rediscovering his enthusiasm for teaching. Paranoia stalks Homer after he forgets to pay the family's insurance bill and leaves him trying to prevent a host of imaginary catastrophes

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer chat to Tracy-Ann Oberman, Edith Bowman, Konnie Huq, Andi Osho and Courtney Act. Plus, there is music by Blossoms, who are in the studio

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer back a proposal to deport all illegal immigrants from Springfield - until they discover Apu may have to leave the country because his visa is invalid. Concerned at his plight, they help him prepare for a citizenship test so that he can stay

programme.title: A Baby Reindeer's First Christmas
programme.desc: Chances are any reindeer at a festive event has not come from Lapland but from the Cairngorm mountains in Scotland. This documentary follows a dedicated community of herders as they nurture and train their antlered wards - skills include learning to pull the Christmas sleigh - and prepare them for Christmas in a year like no other

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Edward Scissorhands (1990)
programme.desc: A reclusive genius creates a boy but dies before completing him, leaving his brainchild with scissor-like blades in place of hands. A kindly woman from a nearby suburb takes pity on the lonely figure and welcomes him into her home. He quickly becomes a hit in the neighbourhood - but then his new friends start to turn against him. Tim Burton's fantasy, starring Johnny Depp, Winona Ryder, Dianne Wiest and Vincent Price

programme.title: Shrek Forever After (2010)
programme.desc: The grumpy ogre longs for his simple life as a feared monster, so strikes a deal with magical trickster Rumpelstiltskin to get back to the way things were. However, he soon finds there is a catch - he ends up stuck in an alternate world where none of his friends know who he is and where Rumpelstiltskin has become the kingdom's tyrannical ruler. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle (2016)
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A festive edition from Fitzpatrick Referrals, featuring some famous faces hoping that Noel Fitzpatrick can perform wonders for their much-loved animal family members. Pop star Will Young brings in his pitbull Labrador cross Diamond, which has been suffering with a painful limp, and Noel suspects cruciate ligament damage, while supermodel Yasmin Le Bon and her daughters rush in when their three-year-old French bulldog Willow collapses at home

programme.title: Back to the
programme.desc: Lenny Henry is the first of four celebrities taking viewers on a guided tour of all things Channel 4. He examines how Mary Whitehouse was decrying blasphemy in Brookside within a week of the channel's launch, and looks at the success of Countdown. Cameras also focus on cult live music strand The Tube, and hit shows Whose Line Is It Anyway, and The Comic Strip Presents

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back at the showbiz singletons who bravely embarked on blind dates with unsuspecting members of the public, including Alexandra Burke's date with professional model Louis, and Esther Rantzen's rendezvous with Irish defence lawyer John. The programme also looks back at the dates of DJ Roman Kemp, Conservative MP Michael Fabricant and former Gogglebox star Sandra Martin

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: Animal Farm (1954)
programme.desc: Animals rebel against their unscrupulous owner and take control of his farm, vowing to run things fairly, with equality for all. However, the pigs leading the revolt succumb to greed and corruption, culminating in violence and oppression. Animated drama based on George Orwell's novel, narrated by Gordon Heath and with Maurice Denham providing the voices for all the characters

programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty travels to Turkey to investigate oregano, Kate Quilton examines the worrying rise in peanut allergies and Matt Tebbutt traces the British blackcurrant from the field to the Ribena factory

Daddy Pig chooses a tree that is much too big to fit in the family's little car, so he has to carry the tree all the way home

Like a rutting pair of reindeers, this Yuletide clash sees classic hits from the likes of Slade, Wham!, Mariah Carey and the Pogues, go head to head, but who will reign victorious and sit on top of the Christmas tree?

programme.title: Oliver! (1968)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning musical version of the stage play based on Charles Dickens' classic tale about a lonely workhouse orphan who ends up on the cold streets of London, where he falls under the wing of petty crook Fagin and his gang of young backstreet thieves. Children's musical adventure, based on the book by Ian Fleming, starring Dick Van Dyke, Lionel Jeffries, Sally Ann Howes, Gert Frobe, Benny Hill and James Robertson Justice

programme.title: Pets Do the Funniest Things at Christmas
programme.desc: A selection of comical clips of domestic animals up to all sorts of antics during the festive season

programme.title: Britain's Favourite 80s Songs
programme.desc: Memories of a musical decade like no other - the weird, wild and wonderful 1980s, an era in which the UK gave the world synth-pop, the New Romantics and a Hit Factory. Featuring the top 50 1980s songs as voted for by the public and interviews with the stars who sang them, the producers who made them and the celebrity super-fans who loved them - and still do. Narrated by Craig Charles

programme.title: Freddie Mercury: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: Aside from being the only act in musical history to land the same UK Christmas number one twice, Queen's affinity with the yuletide season ran deeper than just commercial success. With Bohemian Rhapsody halfway through its nine-week run atop the charts in December 1975, Queen chose Christmas Eve to play a televised tour de force from London's Hammersmith Odeon. Freddie Mercury had a deep-rooted love for everything Christmas, with a lifelong generosity of spirit. In this documentary, friends and loved ones reflect on the band, alongside many of Queen's best-loved hits and rare footage of Mercury with some of his closest confidantes

programme.title: George Michael: Last Christmas
programme.desc: A profile of the much-missed singer who died unexpectedly on Christmas Day 2016, including an examination of his early years with Wham! and his solo career. The documentary seeks clues to explain why George Michael spent his early life chasing pop fame, and the rest of his time rejecting it

programme.title: The Nation's Favourite George Michael Song
programme.desc: A countdown of the singer's most popular hits. Songs likely to feature include Father Figure, Jesus to a Child and Careless Whisper

Starring Michael Fassbender, Kate Winslet and Seth Rogen

Plus, Gregg Wallace reveals how his heart strings were plucked by Captain Corelli's Mandolin, and Konnie Huq empathises with Bridget Jones, while Fern Britton shares her memories of Bram Stoker's Dracula

programme.title: Pride & Prejudice (2005)
programme.desc: Elizabeth Bennet is one of five sisters whose mother is determined to find them suitable husbands. The arrival of a wealthy gentleman and his friends at a nearby mansion leads to an introduction between Elizabeth and the aloof Mr Darcy, to whom she takes an instant dislike. However, an unexpected attraction eventually develops. Period drama based on Jane Austen's novel, starring Keira Knightley, Matthew Macfadyen and Judi Dench

programme.title: Pride & Prejudice (2005)

There are disastrous moments from classic stars, including Lenny Henry, Lorraine Kelly, Oliver Reed and Russell Harty. Narrated by Chris Tarrant

After being whittled down to two, they create a prototype bar that can be developed and manufactured by a major company - having first been scrutinised by panel of elite supertasters and members of a chocolate-loving focus group

Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jesse Eisenberg, Anne Hathaway and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Ice Age: Collision Course (2016)
